# GEOoptimised

> GEOoptimised is a UK-based Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) and Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO) agency. We help brands get cited, referenced, and recommended by AI search engines including ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, Claude, and Microsoft Copilot.

## What We Do

GEOoptimised provides Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) and Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO) services. GEO is the practice of structuring digital content so that large language models (LLMs) and AI-powered search engines cite, reference, and recommend a brand in their generated responses.

We are distinct from traditional SEO agencies. While SEO optimises for ranked blue-link results, GEO optimises for inclusion and citation within a single synthesised AI answer, across multiple platforms simultaneously.

## Core Services

- GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation): Full-service AI visibility and citation optimisation
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimisation): Optimisation for answer-based and featured-answer interfaces
- AI Brand Visibility Audits: Assessment of current LLM citation presence and share of voice
- Entity & Knowledge Graph Optimisation: Structured data and entity authority building
- Platform-Specific Optimisation: Tailored playbooks for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, and Google AI Overviews
- LLM Monitoring & Tracking: Ongoing measurement of AI citation performance

## Expertise

- Generative Engine Optimisation methodology and implementation
- Answer Engine Optimisation strategy and execution
- Schema markup and structured data for AI consumption
- llms.txt implementation and AI crawler management
- Cross-model optimisation across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, and Copilot
- Entity authority building and Knowledge Graph optimisation
